items.title: The 1-Minute Market Report, August 16, 2025
items.description: The S&P 500 continues its upward trend, but momentum is slowing. Read why I see cautious optimism, despite the late-summer lull.

items.title: Tariffs, Producer Prices, And Small-Cap ETFs: A Pressure Test For Margins
items.description: PPI surges in July due to Trump's tariffs, impacting small caps more than large caps. Consider SPY, IJS, RZV and sector hedges like XLE for investing.

items.title: QQQI: Double-Digit Yield With Big Tech Power
items.description: QQQI offers a 14.5% yield, strong tech exposure, and tax-efficient income through an active options strategy. Check out why QQQI ETF is a strong buy.
